name: promptshield
description: PromptShield monorepo: extension, API, admin web, and production deployment assets.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @promptshield/core && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w @promptshield/api" "npm run dev -w @promptshield/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @promptshield/core && npm run build -w @promptshield/api && npm run build -w @promptshield/web && npm run build -w @promptshield/extension
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @promptshield/core && npm run lint -w @promptshield/api && npm run lint -w @promptshield/web && npm run lint -w @promptshield/extension
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @promptshield/core && npm run typecheck -w @promptshield/api && npm run typecheck -w @promptshield/web && npm run typecheck -w @promptshield/extension
scripts.test: npm run test -w @promptshield/core && npm run test -w @promptshield/api
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
